info.name: Pet Care API
info.description: End-to-end Postman collection for the Pet Care backend, updated to match backend/src/urls.py. Run core requests in order after setting admin_username and admin_password in the environment; destructive/logout/password requests are grouped near the end for manual runs.

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Postman Clinic Updated {{run_suffix}}",
  "address": "456 Updated Test Street",
  "phone": "0900000002",
  "email": "clinic_updated_{{run_suffix}}@example.com",
  "is_active": true
}

{
  "name": "General Checkup Updated {{run_suffix}}",
  "service_type": "EXAM",
  "description": "Updated service from Postman",
  "price": "120000.00",
  "duration_minutes": 45,
  "is_active": true
}

{
  "full_name": "Postman Staff Updated {{run_suffix}}",
  "phone": "0911111112",
  "address": "Updated Clinic Staff Address",
  "clinic_id": "{{clinic_id}}",
  "is_active": true
}

exec: pm.test('Appointment waiting for payment', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.eql(200); });

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Postman Medicine Updated {{run_suffix}}",
  "unit": "tablet",
  "description": "Updated medicine from Postman",
  "stock_quantity": 50,
  "price": "15000.00",
  "is_active": true
}

{
  "quantity": 1,
  "dosage": "1 tablet",
  "frequency": "Twice per day",
  "duration_days": 5,
  "instruction": "After meals, updated from Postman"
}

item.name: Create Payment (Manual Fallback - only if no payment exists)
